ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marine_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data entry */,
  "lme" TEXT /* Large Marine Ecosystem (LME) name where data was collected */,
  "lme_num" INTEGER /* Numerical identifier for the LME */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of data collection */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature recorded for that month */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, buoy, ship) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality status of the data (e.g., validated, pending, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the data entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_data_lme FOREIGN KEY ("lme") REFERENCES lme ("lme_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "lme" (
  "lme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LME */,
  "lme_name" TEXT /* Name of the LME */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the LME */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Average latitude of the LME */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Average longitude of the LME */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the LME in square kilometers */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the LME in meters */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., coral reef, open ocean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "month_number" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data entry, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marine data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES marine_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
